# Binmucker

> The personal internet home base of Conor Chepenik. Free tools, daily writing, Bitcoin and Lightning projects, and services priced in sats.

For full details see: https://binmucker.com/llms.txt

## Quick Summary

Binmucker.com is the personal site of Conor Chepenik featuring:
- A 30-minute Bitcoin/AI/SEO consultation priced at 21,000 sats, paid via Lightning
- Daily Bitcoin innovation briefings (AI-generated)
- Free AI-powered local business SEO audit (with premium tiers)
- Free breathing exercise app (5 patterns, no account needed)
- Browser-based Space Invaders game (5 levels, power-ups, endless mode)
- Curated Bitcoin, Lightning, and music tools (Sound Money Mortgage, Saylorscope, Nostr, Fortune Sats, RyRacer, GuitarGui, Bitcoin Coloring Book, Handwritten Letters)
- Daily writing on Medium and long-form posts on the Binmucker blog

## Homepage Sections (anchored)

- `#built-by-me` — Built by Me
- `#bitcoin-lightning` — Bitcoin & Lightning
- `#writing` — Writing & Ideas
- `#play-practice` — Play & Practice
- `#picks-partners` — Picks & Partners (affiliates, disclosed)

## API

- POST /api/audit — Run an SEO audit (JSON in/out)
- GET /api/briefing — Get latest Bitcoin innovation briefings
